name: Chicken Breasts Stuffed with Smoked Gouda
recipeIngredient: 8 Chicken breast halves, Bone-in, skin on, pounded thin
Salt and fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cut the Anaheim chiles in half lengthwise and remove the stem.
3. Place the chicken breasts between two sheets of plastic wrap and pound with a meat mallet until thin, about 1/8 inch thick.
4. Combine cumin, cilantro, Smoked Gouda, pumpkin seeds, and olive oil in a bowl until well mixed.
5. Spoon the mixture into each chicken breast half, making sure to evenly distribute it inside.
6. Fold the edges of the chicken over the filling to create a secure package.
7. Place the stuffed chicken breasts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
9. Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
